title: Puppet Master Wiring Matrix
description: Defines the wiring between Puppet Master UI elements, command dispatchers, handlers, and expected domain events. Each entry maps a UI element to its command, handler, expected events, and acceptance criteria.

$schema.description: JSON Schema draft URL for self-referencing validation.

schema_id.description: Schema identifier for this Puppet Master wiring matrix document.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this wiring matrix was generated.

entries.description: Map of wiring entries keyed by ui_element_id. Object keys enforce uniqueness for interactive element IDs.

WiringEntry.description: A single wiring entry mapping a Puppet Master UI element to its command, handler, expected events, and acceptance checks.

ui_element_id.description: Stable identifier for the UI element (e.g., "btn.github.connect", "menu.lsp.goto_def"). Lowercase, dot-separated. Must match the containing entries key.

ui_location.description: Panel or screen where the element lives (e.g., "Settings > GitHub/Auth", "File Editor toolbar", "Orchestrator > Node Graph Display").

ui_command_id.description: The UICommand ID dispatched by this element. Must start with "cmd." and be lowercase dot-separated.

handler_location.description: Canonical Rust module/function path for the handler (e.g., "handlers::github_auth::connect" or "crate::core::widget_layout::add_widget"). Final segment must be the callable handler symbol.

expected_event_types.description: List of event type strings emitted by the handler. May be empty for UI-only commands that declare no persisted domain event. Each entry should match an EventRecord type string.

acceptance_checks.description: Testable assertions that verify this wiring entry works. Each string is a human-readable check description.

evidence_required.description: Description of what evidence must exist to prove this wiring works (e.g., "Test exercising cmd.github.connect dispatch returns expected events", "Screenshot or headless render showing button exists").

example.description: Optional marker for template/example-only rows. Example rows do not satisfy production coverage gates.
